# GymKioskApp - Implementation Code Examples

Quick-reference code snippets for the top 5 recommended features.

---

## 1️⃣ PROGRESSIVE OVERLOAD TRACKING (PR System)

### Step 1: Update Exercise Card HTML

In `index.html`, update exercise card structure:

```html
<div id="exerciseScreen" class="screen hidden">
  <h2>Exercises for <span id="muscleGroupTitle"></span></h2>
  
  <div id="exerciseList" class="exercise-list">
    <!-- Generated by JavaScript -->
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Exercise Detail Modal (add or update) -->
<div id="exerciseDetailModal" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-content">
    <h3 id="exerciseName"></h3>
    
    <!-- How To Instructions -->
    <div id="howToSection">
      <h4>How To Perform</h4>
      <ol id="howToList"></ol>
    </div>
    
    <!-- Video (if available) -->
    <div id="videoSection" class="hidden">
      <video id="exerciseVideo" width="100%" controls></video>
    </div>
    
    <!-- WEIGHT/REPS INPUT - NEW -->
    <div class="exercise-tracking-section">
      <h4>Log This Exercise</h4>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="exerciseSets">Sets Completed:</label>
        <input type="number" id="exerciseSets" min="1" value="3" />
      </div>
      
      <div id="setsContainer">
        <!-- Dynamically generated set inputs -->
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="exerciseNotes">Notes (form, difficulty, etc):</label>
        <textarea id="exerciseNotes" placeholder="Felt strong, form was good..."></textarea>
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="exerciseRPE">Rate Your Effort (1-10):</label>
        <input type="range" id="exerciseRPE" min="1" max="10" value="5" />
        <span id="rpeValue">5</span>
      </div>
      
      <!-- Show previous attempt -->
      <div id="previousAttempt" class="previous-attempt hidden">
        <strong>Last Time:</strong> <span id="previousWeight"></span> lbs × <span id="previousReps"></span>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <button id="completeExerciseBtn" class="btn-primary">✓ Complete Exercise</button>
    <button id="closeExerciseModal" class="btn-secondary">Cancel</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Step 2: Update User Data Structure in `js/ui.js`

```javascript
function seedDefaultUser() {
  const users = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('users') || '[]');

  if (!users.length) {
    const defaultUsers = [
      {
        username: 'RICK',
        pin: '1234',
        favorites: { exercises: [], muscles: [] },
        icon: 'user-icon-01.svg',
        color: '#06B6D4',
        
        // NEW: Workout history with weight tracking
        workoutHistory: [],
        
        // NEW: Personal Records database
        personalRecords: {
          // "Bench Press": { weight: 250, reps: 1, estimatedMax: 265, date: "2025-02-10" }
        },
        
        // NEW: Exercise history (for "previous attempt" display)
        exerciseHistory: {
          // "Bench Press": [
          //   { sets: [{ reps: 5, weight: 225 }, { reps: 5, weight: 225 }, { reps: 3, weight: 225 }], date: "2025-02-01" },
          //   { sets: [{ reps: 5, weight: 220 }, { reps: 5, weight: 220 }, { reps: 5, weight: 220 }], date: "2025-01-29" }
          // ]
        },
        
        currentStreak: 0,
        badges: []
      }
      // ... rest of users
    ];

    localStorage.setItem('users', JSON.stringify(defaultUsers));
  }
}
```

### Step 3: Add Functions to `js/ui.js`

```javascript
// ============================================
// PROGRESSIVE OVERLOAD TRACKING
// ============================================

/**
 * Get previous attempt for an exercise
 */
function getPreviousAttempt(username, exerciseName) {
  const users = getUsers();
  const user = users.find(u => u.username === username);
  
  if (!user || !user.exerciseHistory) return null;
  
  const attempts = user.exerciseHistory[exerciseName];
  if (!attempts || attempts.length === 0) return null;
  
  // Return most recent attempt
  return attempts[attempts.length - 1];
}

/**
 * Show previous attempt in modal
 */
function displayPreviousAttempt(exerciseName) {
  const previous = getPreviousAttempt(window.currentUser, exerciseName);
  const prevDiv = document.getElementById('previousAttempt');
  
  if (!previous) {
    prevDiv.classList.add('hidden');
    return;
  }
  
  // Show previous best set
  const bestSet = previous.sets.reduce((best, current) => 
    (current.weight * current.reps > best.weight * best.reps) ? current : best
  );
  
  document.getElementById('previousWeight').textContent = bestSet.weight;
  document.getElementById('previousReps').textContent = bestSet.reps;
  prevDiv.classList.remove('hidden');
}

/**
 * Generate set input fields based on number of sets
 */
function generateSetInputs() {
  const numSets = parseInt(document.getElementById('exerciseSets').value) || 3;
  const container = document.getElementById('setsContainer');
  container.innerHTML = '';
  
  for (let i = 1; i <= numSets; i++) {
    const setDiv = document.createElement('div');
    setDiv.className = 'set-input-group';
    setDiv.innerHTML = `
      <div class="set-number">Set ${i}</div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Weight (lbs)</label>
        <input type="number" class="set-weight" data-set="${i}" value="0" />
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Reps</label>
        <input type="number" class="set-reps" data-set="${i}" value="8" min="1" max="20" />
      </div>
    `;
    container.appendChild(setDiv);
  }
}

/**
 * Save workout with weight/reps data
 */
function saveWorkoutWithWeight(muscleGroup, exerciseName) {
  const sets = [];
  const setWeights = document.querySelectorAll('.set-weight');
  const setReps = document.querySelectorAll('.set-reps');
  
  setWeights.forEach((weightInput, index) => {
    const weight = parseFloat(weightInput.value) || 0;
    const reps = parseInt(setReps[index].value) || 0;
    
    if (weight > 0 && reps > 0) {
      sets.push({ weight, reps });
    }
  });
  
  const notes = document.getElementById('exerciseNotes').value;
  const rpe = parseInt(document.getElementById('exerciseRPE').value);
  
  // Add to exercise history
  const users = getUsers();
  const user = users.find(u => u.username === window.currentUser);
  
  if (!user.exerciseHistory) user.exerciseHistory = {};
  if (!user.exerciseHistory[exerciseName]) user.exerciseHistory[exerciseName] = [];
  
  user.exerciseHistory[exerciseName].push({
    sets: sets,
    notes: notes,
    rpe: rpe,
    date: new Date().toISOString(),
    muscleGroup: muscleGroup
  });
  
  // Update PR if new personal record
  updatePersonalRecords(user, exerciseName, sets);
  
  saveUsers(users);
  
  // Show celebration if PR
  if (isPRSet(exerciseName, sets)) {
    showPRCelebration(exerciseName);
  }
}

/**
 * Check if a set is a new personal record
 */
function isPRSet(exerciseName, sets) {
  const users = getUsers();
  const user = users.find(u => u.username === window.currentUser);
  
  if (!user.personalRecords) user.personalRecords = {};
  
  const currentPR = user.personalRecords[exerciseName];
  if (!currentPR) return true; // First time = PR
  
  // Check if any set beat the PR
  return sets.some(set => set.weight > currentPR.weight || 
                         (set.weight === currentPR.weight && set.reps > currentPR.reps));
}

/**
 * Update personal records based on completed sets
 */
function updatePersonalRecords(user, exerciseName, sets) {
  if (!user.personalRecords) user.personalRecords = {};
  
  // Find best set (highest weight, or highest weight with most reps)
  const bestSet = sets.reduce((best, current) => {
    if (!best) return current;
    if (current.weight > best.weight) return current;
    if (current.weight === best.weight && current.reps > best.reps) return current;
    return best;
  });
  
  const currentPR = user.personalRecords[exerciseName];
  
  // Only update if it's better
  if (!currentPR || 
      bestSet.weight > currentPR.weight || 
      (bestSet.weight === currentPR.weight && bestSet.reps > currentPR.reps)) {
    
    user.personalRecords[exerciseName] = {
      weight: bestSet.weight,
      reps: bestSet.reps,
      sets: sets.length,
      estimatedMax: estimateOneRepMax(bestSet.weight, bestSet.reps),
      date: new Date().toISOString()
    };
  }
}

/**
 * Estimate 1RM using Epley formula
 * 1RM = Weight × (1 + (Reps / 30))
 */
function estimateOneRepMax(weight, reps) {
  if (reps >= 1) {
    return Math.round(weight * (1 + (reps / 30)));
  }
  return weight;
}

/**
 * Show PR celebration
 */
function showPRCelebration(exerciseName) {
  const modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.className = 'pr-celebration-modal';
  modal.innerHTML = `
    <div class="pr-celebration-content">
      <div class="pr-celebration-icon">🏆</div>
      <h2>NEW PERSONAL RECORD!</h2>
      <p>${exerciseName}</p>
      <button onclick="this.parentElement.parentElement.remove()">Awesome! 💪</button>
    </div>
  `;
  document.body.appendChild(modal);
  
  setTimeout(() => {
    modal.classList.add('show');
  }, 100);
  
  setTimeout(() => {
    modal.classList.remove('show');
    setTimeout(() => modal.remove(), 500);
  }, 3000);
}

// Event listeners
document.getElementById('exerciseSets')?.addEventListener('change', generateSetInputs);
document.getElementById('exerciseRPE')?.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
  document.getElementById('rpeValue').textContent = e.target.value;
});
```

### Step 4: Add CSS to `css/style.css`

```css
/* ============================================
   PROGRESSIVE OVERLOAD UI
============================================ */

.exercise-tracking-section {
  background: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.1);
  border: 2px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 20px;
  margin: 20px 0;
}

.set-input-group {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 60px 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 15px;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
  padding: 12px;
  background: rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.05);
  border-radius: 8px;
}

.set-number {
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #d4af37;
}

.form-group {
  margin-bottom: 15px;
}

.form-group label {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #f5f7fa;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.form-group input[type="number"],
.form-group input[type="range"],
.form-group textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 10px;
  background: rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.1);
  border: 1px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3);
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #f5f7fa;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.form-group textarea {
  resize: vertical;
  min-height: 80px;
  font-family: monospace;
}

.previous-attempt {
  background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.1);
  border-left: 4px solid #22c55e;
  padding: 12px;
  margin: 15px 0;
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #86efac;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.previous-attempt.hidden {
  display: none;
}

/* PR Celebration Modal */
.pr-celebration-modal {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  z-index: 9999;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
}

.pr-celebration-modal.show {
  opacity: 1;
}

.pr-celebration-content {
  text-align: center;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #d4af37 0%, #f59e0b 100%);
  padding: 40px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  box-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.8);
  animation: pulse-scale 0.5s ease;
}

.pr-celebration-icon {
  font-size: 4rem;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  animation: bounce 0.6s ease;
}

.pr-celebration-content h2 {
  color: #000;
  font-size: 2.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.pr-celebration-content p {
  color: #000;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.pr-celebration-content button {
  padding: 12px 30px;
  background: #000;
  color: #d4af37;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: bold;
}

@keyframes pulse-scale {
  0% { transform: scale(0.8); opacity: 0; }
  50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
  100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes bounce {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-20px); }
}
```

---

## 2️⃣ PERSONAL RECORDS DASHBOARD

### Add to `js/ui.js`

```javascript
/**
 * Render Personal Records screen
 */
function renderPersonalRecordsScreen() {
  const users = getUsers();
  const user = users.find(u => u.username === window.currentUser);
  
  if (!user || !user.personalRecords || Object.keys(user.personalRecords).length === 0) {
    document.getElementById('prContainer').innerHTML = `
      <div class="empty-state">
        <p>No personal records yet. Complete your first weighted exercise!</p>
      </div>
    `;
    return;
  }
  
  // Sort by weight (highest first)
  const prs = Object.entries(user.personalRecords)
    .sort((a, b) => b[1].weight - a[1].weight)
    .slice(0, 10); // Top 10 PRs
  
  let html = '<div class="pr-grid">';
  
  prs.forEach(([exerciseName, prData]) => {
    const date = new Date(prData.date).toLocaleDateString();
    
    html += `
      <div class="pr-card">
        <h3>${exerciseName}</h3>
        <div class="pr-main-stat">
          <span class="pr-weight">${prData.weight}</span>
          <span class="pr-unit">lbs</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pr-details">
          <div>Reps: ${prData.reps}</div>
          <div>Est. 1RM: ${prData.estimatedMax} lbs</div>
          <div class="pr-date">Set: ${date}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  });
  
  html += '</div>';
  document.getElementById('prContainer').innerHTML = html;
}
```

### Add HTML to `index.html`

```html
<div id="personalRecordsScreen" class="screen hidden">
  <h2>🏆 My Personal Records</h2>
  <div id="prContainer" class="pr-container">
    <!-- Generated by JavaScript -->
  </div>
</div>
```

### Add CSS to `css/style.css`

```css
.pr-container {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}

.pr-card {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.2) 0%, rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.05) 100%);
  border: 2px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.5);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 20px;
  text-align: center;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.pr-card:hover {
  border-color: #d4af37;
  box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.4);
  transform: translateY(-5px);
}

.pr-card h3 {
  margin: 0 0 15px 0;
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  color: #f5f7fa;
}

.pr-main-stat {
  font-size: 2.5rem;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #d4af37;
  margin: 15px 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.pr-weight {
  font-size: 3rem;
}

.pr-unit {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
}

.pr-details {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.8);
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3);
  padding-top: 12px;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

.pr-date {
  color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.7);
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  margin-top: 8px;
}
```

## 3️⃣ BODY MEASUREMENTS TRACKER

### Add to `js/ui.js`

```javascript
/**
 * Open body measurements form
 */
function openBodyMeasurementsForm() {
  const modal = document.getElementById('bodyMeasurementsModal');
  if (modal) modal.classList.remove('hidden');
  
  // Populate with latest measurements
  const users = getUsers();
  const user = users.find(u => u.username === window.currentUser);
  
  if (user && user.bodyMetrics && user.bodyMetrics.length > 0) {
    const latest = user.bodyMetrics[user.bodyMetrics.length - 1];
    document.getElementById('inputWeight').value = latest.weight || '';
    document.getElementById('inputBodyFat').value = latest.bodyFat || '';
    document.getElementById('inputChest').value = latest.measurements?.chest || '';
    document.getElementById('inputWaist').value = latest.measurements?.waist || '';
    document.getElementById('inputHips').value = latest.measurements?.hips || '';
    document.getElementById('inputArms').value = latest.measurements?.arms || '';
    document.getElementById('inputThighs').value = latest.measurements?.thighs || '';
    document.getElementById('inputCalves').value = latest.measurements?.calves || '';
  }
}

/**
 * Save body measurements
 */
function saveBodyMeasurements() {
  const users = getUsers();
  const user = users.find(u => u.username === window.currentUser);
  
  if (!user) return;
  if (!user.bodyMetrics) user.bodyMetrics = [];
  
  const measurements = {
    date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
    weight: parseFloat(document.getElementById('inputWeight').value) || 0,
    bodyFat: parseFloat(document.getElementById('inputBodyFat').value) || 0,
    measurements: {
      chest: parseFloat(document.getElementById('inputChest').value) || 0,
      waist: parseFloat(document.getElementById('inputWaist').value) || 0,
      hips: parseFloat(document.getElementById('inputHips').value) || 0,
      arms: parseFloat(document.getElementById('inputArms').value) || 0,
      thighs: parseFloat(document.getElementById('inputThighs').value) || 0,
      calves: parseFloat(document.getElementById('inputCalves').value) || 0
    }
  };
  
  user.bodyMetrics.push(measurements);
  saveUsers(users);
  
  document.getElementById('bodyMeasurementsModal')?.classList.add('hidden');
  renderBodyMetricsChart();
}

/**
 * Display weight progress chart
 */
function renderBodyMetricsChart() {
  const users = getUsers();
  const user = users.find(u => u.username === window.currentUser);
  
  if (!user || !user.bodyMetrics || user.bodyMetrics.length === 0) {
    document.getElementById('bodyMetricsContainer').innerHTML = '<p>No measurements recorded yet</p>';
    return;
  }
  
  const metrics = user.bodyMetrics;
  const latestMetric = metrics[metrics.length - 1];
  
  let html = `
    <div class="body-metrics-summary">
      <div class="metric-card">
        <label>Current Weight</label>
        <div class="metric-value">${latestMetric.weight} <span class="metric-unit">lbs</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="metric-card">
        <label>Body Fat %</label>
        <div class="metric-value">${latestMetric.bodyFat} <span class="metric-unit">%</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="metric-card">
        <label>Lean Mass</label>
        <div class="metric-value">${Math.round(latestMetric.weight * (1 - (latestMetric.bodyFat / 100)))} <span class="metric-unit">lbs</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <h4>Measurements</h4>
    <div class="measurements-grid">
      <div class="measurement">
        <label>Chest</label>
        <span>${latestMetric.measurements.chest}"</span>
      </div>
      <div class="measurement">
        <label>Waist</label>
        <span>${latestMetric.measurements.waist}"</span>
      </div>
      <div class="measurement">
        <label>Hips</label>
        <span>${latestMetric.measurements.hips}"</span>
      </div>
      <div class="measurement">
        <label>Arms</label>
        <span>${latestMetric.measurements.arms}"</span>
      </div>
      <div class="measurement">
        <label>Thighs</label>
        <span>${latestMetric.measurements.thighs}"</span>
      </div>
      <div class="measurement">
        <label>Calves</label>
        <span>${latestMetric.measurements.calves}"</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <h4>Weight Progress</h4>
    <div class="weight-progress">
  `;
  
  // Show weight trend (last 10 measurements)
  const recentMetrics = metrics.slice(-10);
  const minWeight = Math.min(...recentMetrics.map(m => m.weight));
  const maxWeight = Math.max(...recentMetrics.map(m => m.weight));
  const range = maxWeight - minWeight || 1;
  
  recentMetrics.forEach(metric => {
    const normalized = (metric.weight - minWeight) / range * 100;
    const date = new Date(metric.date).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
    html += `
      <div class="weight-item" title="${metric.weight} lbs">
        <div class="weight-bar" style="height: ${normalized + 20}px;"></div>
        <div class="weight-label">${date}</div>
      </div>
    `;
  });
  
  html += '</div>';
  document.getElementById('bodyMetricsContainer').innerHTML = html;
}
```

### Add HTML to `index.html`

```html
<!-- Body Measurements Screen -->
<div id="bodyMetricsScreen" class="screen hidden">
  <h2>📏 Body Measurements</h2>
  <button id="addMeasurementBtn" class="btn-primary">+ Add Measurement</button>
  <div id="bodyMetricsContainer" class="body-metrics-container">
    <!-- Generated by JavaScript -->
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Body Measurements Modal -->
<div id="bodyMeasurementsModal" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-content">
    <h3>Record Body Measurements</h3>
    <form class="measurements-form">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Weight (lbs)</label>
        <input type="number" id="inputWeight" step="0.1" />
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Body Fat %</label>
        <input type="number" id="inputBodyFat" step="0.1" />
      </div>
      
      <h4>Measurements (inches)</h4>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Chest</label>
        <input type="number" id="inputChest" step="0.1" />
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Waist</label>
        <input type="number" id="inputWaist" step="0.1" />
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Hips</label>
        <input type="number" id="inputHips" step="0.1" />
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Arms</label>
        <input type="number" id="inputArms" step="0.1" />
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Thighs</label>
        <input type="number" id="inputThighs" step="0.1" />
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Calves</label>
        <input type="number" id="inputCalves" step="0.1" />
      </div>
      
      <button type="button" id="saveMeasurementsBtn" class="btn-primary">Save Measurements</button>
      <button type="button" id="closeMeasurementsBtn" class="btn-secondary">Cancel</button>
    </form>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Add CSS to `css/style.css`

```css
.body-metrics-summary {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
  gap: 15px;
  margin: 20px 0;
}

.metric-card {
  background: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.1);
  border: 2px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 20px;
  text-align: center;
}

.metric-card label {
  display: block;
  color: rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.7);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.metric-value {
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #d4af37;
}

.metric-unit {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.7);
  margin-left: 5px;
}

.measurements-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr));
  gap: 15px;
  margin: 20px 0;
}

.measurement {
  background: rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.05);
  border: 1px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 15px;
  text-align: center;
}

.measurement label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.7);
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.measurement span {
  display: block;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #f5f7fa;
}

.weight-progress {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-end;
  gap: 8px;
  height: 200px;
  margin: 20px 0;
  padding: 20px;
  background: rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.05);
  border-radius: 12px;
}

.weight-item {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.weight-bar {
  width: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #d4af37 0%, #f59e0b 100%);
  border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
  min-height: 20px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.weight-item:hover .weight-bar {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f59e0b 0%, #d4af37 100%);
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.5);
}

.weight-label {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.6);
  margin-top: 8px;
  text-align: center;
}
```

---

## 4️⃣ VOLUME TRACKING

### Add to `js/analytics.js`

```javascript
/**
 * Calculate total volume for a workout
 * Volume = Sum of (Weight × Reps × Sets)
 */
function calculateWorkoutVolume(exerciseHistory) {
  let totalVolume = 0;
  
  Object.values(exerciseHistory).forEach(attempts => {
    if (Array.isArray(attempts)) {
      attempts.forEach(attempt => {
        if (attempt.sets && Array.isArray(attempt.sets)) {
          attempt.sets.forEach(set => {
            totalVolume += (set.weight * set.reps);
          });
        }
      });
    }
  });
  
  return totalVolume;
}

/**
 * Get volume per week
 */
function getWeeklyVolume(username, weeksBack = 12) {
  const users = getUsers();
  const user = users.find(u => u.username === username);
  
  if (!user || !user.exerciseHistory) return {};
  
  const weeklyVolume = {};
  const now = new Date();
  
  // Initialize last N weeks
  for (let i = 0; i < weeksBack; i++) {
    const weekStart = new Date(now);
    weekStart.setDate(weekStart.getDate() - (i * 7));
    const weekKey = `Week of ${weekStart.toLocaleDateString()}`;
    weeklyVolume[weekKey] = 0;
  }
  
  // Calculate volume per week
  Object.values(user.exerciseHistory).forEach(attempts => {
    if (Array.isArray(attempts)) {
      attempts.forEach(attempt => {
        const attemptDate = new Date(attempt.date);
        const weekStart = new Date(attemptDate);
        weekStart.setDate(weekStart.getDate() - weekStart.getDay());
        const weekKey = `Week of ${weekStart.toLocaleDateString()}`;
        
        if (weeklyVolume.hasOwnProperty(weekKey) && attempt.sets) {
          attempt.sets.forEach(set => {
            weeklyVolume[weekKey] += (set.weight * set.reps);
          });
        }
      });
    }
  });
  
  return weeklyVolume;
}

/**
 * Get total volume stats
 */
function getVolumeStats(username) {
  const users = getUsers();
  const user = users.find(u => u.username === username);
  
  if (!user || !user.exerciseHistory) return null;
  
  const weeklyVolume = getWeeklyVolume(username, 4);
  const volumes = Object.values(weeklyVolume).filter(v => v > 0);
  
  return {
    currentWeek: volumes[0] || 0,
    lastWeek: volumes[1] || 0,
    avgPerWeek: volumes.length > 0 ? Math.round(volumes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / volumes.length) : 0,
    totalAllTime: calculateWorkoutVolume(user.exerciseHistory),
    weekly: weeklyVolume
  };
}
```

### Add HTML to `index.html`

```html
<div id="volumeStatsSection" class="analytics-card">
  <h3>💪 Volume Tracking</h3>
  <div class="volume-stats">
    <div class="stat">
      <label>Current Week</label>
      <div class="stat-value" id="volumeThisWeek">0</div>
      <div class="stat-label">lbs</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat">
      <label>Avg Per Week</label>
      <div class="stat-value" id="volumeAvgWeek">0</div>
      <div class="stat-label">lbs</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat">
      <label>Total All-Time</label>
      <div class="stat-value" id="volumeTotal">0</div>
      <div class="stat-label">lbs</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="volumeChart" style="height: 200px; margin-top: 20px;"></div>
</div>
```

---

These code examples give you a solid foundation for implementing the top features. Each feature follows the same pattern:

1. **Update HTML** (add form inputs / display containers)
2. **Add JS functions** (logic to save/retrieve data)
3. **Add event listeners** (button clicks, form submissions)
4. **Add CSS** (styling for new elements)
5. **Test thoroughly** (verify localStorage saves correctly)

---

*See IMPLEMENTATION_CHECKLIST.md for the complete roadmap*
